intro: This archive tracks six high-severity APT reports from mid-April 2026. The activity features distinct threat actors CyberAv3ngers, Sapphire Sleet, and SideWinder. Their operations primarily targeted the cryptocurrency, government, and healthcare sectors, with significant impact on industrial and technology organizations as well. Geographically, incidents spanned from the United States and Ukraine to Bangladesh and South Asia, with several campaigns noted as having a Global reach. All documented attacks in this period were assessed as high severity.
